no_trace_prior.definition: Use trace_belief_sem_only rows: semantic belief evidence retained, trace/coord/unit prior removed by existing readout variant.

risk_object_removal_or_shift.definition: In planning-lite synthetic path-risk readout, set predicted object risk to zero for removal and raise to >=0.9 for shifted-near-path.

semantic_swap_fixed_trace.definition: Not executed because raw semantic token/evidence maps are unavailable.

shuffled_trace.definition: Within panel+seed, rotate full_trace_belief top1_candidate_id to replace target trace association with another object trace proxy while preserving item semantic context.
